reason_for_call: Triage a sent message and draft a reply

task_params.subject: Workshop materials follow-up
reply_points: Apologize for the delay in sending materials
Confirm the slide deck and worksheet are attached
Offer to answer questions or tailor examples for her team
Suggest a brief check-in next week if helpful

attributes.subject: Workshop materials follow-up
attributes.body: Hi Iris, thanks again for leading the creative culture session. Just circling back on the materials you mentioned you'd send over when you had a chance.

attributes.subject: Workshop materials follow-up
attributes.body: Great meeting today. I realized I forgot to include the workshop packet in my recap, but I'll send the materials shortly.

attributes.subject: Workshop materials for onboarding session
attributes.body: Thanks for offering to share the onboarding exercises. No rush, just whenever you have them ready.

attributes.subject: Re: Candidate panel notes
attributes.body: Sending over the notes from today's panel discussion.
